response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine high-throughput distributed-systems experience (microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), strong TypeScript, and directly relevant AI-native exposure in his current role building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling. However, Python — a must-have listed as 'strong' — is absent from his resume and skills list, his deepest performance work is in the niche D language, and evidence of directing technical strategy at staff scope across stakeholders is thin, with most of his career at senior IC level on product feature work.
strengths: Hands-on AI-native engineering experience: MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks in current role
Proven high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong TypeScript/Node depth plus polyglot breadth, testing culture, and operational/dev-ops self-sufficiency
concerns: No Python listed anywhere on the resume — a must-have skill for the role
Limited demonstrated experience directing technical strategy or cross-functional stakeholder alignment at staff scope
Deepest systems-performance work is in DLang and dates to 2018–2020; recent roles skew toward product feature development
